# truenas_service (Data Source)

Provides information about a service on TrueNAS SCALE.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "truenas_service" "ssh" {
  service = "ssh"
}

output "ssh_state" {
  value = data.truenas_service.ssh.state
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `service` (String) The service name to look up (e.g., ssh, nfs, cifs, ftp, snmp, ups).

### Read-Only

- `enable` (Boolean) Whether the service is enabled to start at boot.
- `id` (Number) The service ID.
- `state` (String) The current state of the service (RUNNING, STOPPED).
